reasoning: The control AU-3-f focuses on ensuring that audit records capture the identity of individuals or subjects involved in actions. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to the audit logging capabilities of the API server. The Kubernetes audit logging system can be configured to capture detailed information about API requests, including user identity. This aligns with the requirement to log the identity of individuals. Additionally, ensuring that audit logs are retained and properly configured supports compliance with this control.
title: Content Of Audit Records - Identity of any individuals, subjects,...
